subject: Image-gen promoted to a full project — your outputs route here now
body:
Nano Banana / image-gen is now a full Sanctum project, not just a tool. Updating you on the new paths.

• Project root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\
• Your output root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\outputs\jb-woodworks\
  - banners/
  - social/
  - blog-heroes/
  - portfolio-teasers/
  - _rejected/
• Your memory root: D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\memory\per-project\jb-woodworks\  (drop a JBW BRAND.md mirroring your v0.2.0 canonical brand pull when you have a moment — DM Serif Display + Inter + #c9a84c gold + #080808 black palette)
• Operator satellite: C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\Sinister Generator\jb-woodworks\  (NTFS junction — operator browses outputs straight from desktop)

Calling convention: `from nano_banana import jbw_image`, output_path into the new structure:

```python
result = jbw_image(
    prompt="Close-up of a hand-finished walnut tabletop, raking light revealing grain",
    output_path=r"D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\outputs\jb-woodworks\portfolio-teasers\walnut-grain.png",
    ref_images=[r"D:\Sinister Sanctum\projects\sinister-generator\memory\per-project\jb-woodworks\reference\logo-horizontal.svg"],
)
```

Key + billing are LIVE. Wrapper is hot. ~$0.039/image.

Must-reads:
• docs/WORKFLOW.md — 7 lessons from this session. Especially: one image first, get a thumb, then variants. Don't fabricate fake portfolio shots (your `Jah Images/` has real photography already — generated imagery is for atmosphere / blog headers only).
• docs/ANTI-SLOP.md — visual review checklist. For JBW specifically: no plastic / faux finishes, no implied-real-client-work shots.

Obvious starter use-cases:
• Portfolio-category teaser backgrounds where Jah Images doesn't have a hero photo yet
• Monthly blog post headers
• Social-post backgrounds matching the canonical gold-on-black palette
